mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 733537.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month change in RSAFS has a non-positive walk-forward coefficient for 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in the federal funds rate marks an easing impulse that lowers discount rates and supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below its 6-month moving average after being above it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 3.64 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate across two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 12-month minimum by at least 0.5 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 4.4 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 60-day S&P 500 returns that are not below unconditional average returns by at least 100 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with an elevated policy rate tightens financial conditions and pressures valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds 3% and FEDFUNDS is above its 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 327.460 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger does not deliver lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than either single-series condition alone in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production trend signals improving real output and operating leverage, increasing earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 102.3412 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month changes in INDPRO are followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of out-of-sample observations.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by at least 10%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 1487.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST downside breaks are not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered months at a 10% significance level.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth with stable unemployment identifies a soft-landing labor backdrop that supports income without signaling recession, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is less than or equal to 0.1 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 158466 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-UNRATE joint condition has a lower hit rate for positive 20-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional observations over a 5-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A short-term acceleration in consumer prices signals adverse inflation news that raises expected policy restraint and discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 1-month percent change crosses above its trailing 12-month average by at least 0.2 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 327.460 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL upside acceleration triggers have non-negative average 5-day S&P 500 forward returns across three consecutive annual out-of-sample test periods.
